title: Peppery Crumbly Mediterranean Linguine Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish featuring linguine pasta with a peppery kick and crumbly texture for a pescatarian-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 bell pepper, any color, diced
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet variety for milder taste.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best flavor.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and red onion; sauté until soft, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the lemon juice and bring to a simmer. Cook for an additional minute to reduce slightly.
Stir in chopped bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 more minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to your preference.
Add linguine pasta and enough water to cover the pasta; stir well.
Simmer for another couple of minutes allowing the pasta to absorb some of the liquid from the lemon sauce.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
